sentence_reviews.text: Evaluation-driven development makes tests, risk thresholds, regression suites, and release gates part of the iterative model and application lifecycle.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: NIST AI RMF covers test, evaluation, validation, risk thresholds/tolerances, monitoring, documentation, deployment governance, and lifecycle risk management.
